text: The clearing is quiet tonight. The lantern hums softly.
Leaves rustle gently overhead. Everything feels still.
Take a breath. The lantern is here. You are here.
Even the fog settles eventually. Give it time.
Rest is not laziness. The lantern will keep watch.
Close your eyes for a moment. The clearing will wait.
The lantern burns bright today! What shall we explore?
Your spark is contagious. Even the fireflies are dancing.
